titleEn: Rauch shows latest top-of-the-range fertiliser spreader at DLG Feldtage
titleZh: Rauch在DLG田间日展示最新顶级撒肥机Axis 55
summaryZh: 撒肥机制造商Rauch在DLG田间日推出新型Axis 55撒肥机，取代现有50.2系列。该机型配备3500升料斗，最大流量提升30%至675公斤/分钟，支持12至56米工作宽度，仅需3套撒肥盘即可覆盖此前6套的范围。可选液压或机械驱动，并配备新型GSE-X边界撒肥板和Axmat-X雷达监测系统，适合高速作业（25公里/小时下36米幅宽可施900公斤/公顷）。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了精准施肥领域的最新自动化与传感器技术（如雷达监测、自动流量控制），虽非直接针对养殖业，但对智慧畜牧中的饲料精准投喂、粪肥撒施等场景有技术借鉴价值，适合关注大田作物与畜牧结合的综合型从业者阅读。
contentFull: Rauch shows latest top-of-the-range fertiliser spreader at DLG Feldtage 23-06 | Crop solutions | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintAfter the Axis 25 introduced last year, spreader manufacturer Rauch is now launching the new Axis 55. The model replaces the current 50.2 models and mainly offers more capacity than its predecessor. This model has a 3,500-litre hopper. Photos: René KoerhuisThe DLG Feldtage did not feature many machine premieres, but fertiliser spreader manufacturer Rauch did use the event to show a new machine.And with the Axis 55, that is immediately the top model after the manufacturer launched the new Axis 25 last year. The Axis 55 succeeds the existing Axis 50.2 models and will therefore also be available in a mechanically PTO-driven version and a hydraulically driven version. The similarity with its ‘little brother’, the Axis 25, is the increased maximum flow rate of 675 kg/min. That is 30% more than before. Rauch further developed the discs and vanes for a wider range of working widths. The intention is that 3 disc sets will allow spreading from 12 to 56 metres wide, although it cannot be ruled out that a 4th set will be needed for light fertiliser types at large working widths.Up to 900 kg/haThe new Rauch top model fits in with developments and the drive for more capacity, with hopper volume and especially flow rate increasing in order to spread at relatively high forward speeds. Thanks to the increased flow rate, it should be possible to apply 900 kg/ha at a working width of 36 metres while driving at 25 km/h. At the other end of the spectrum, low application rates, such as slug pellets for example, can be applied without modifications and/or accessories.3 disc sets, up to 56 metresDepending on the fertiliser type, the spreader can spread at a minimum width of 12 metres and a maximum width of 56 metres. For this, ‘only’ 3 different disc sets are required. Until now, 6 disc sets were needed to cover those working widths. The shape of the discs and vanes has been further developed with a view to more working widths, previously 18-50 metres, and as before the vanes are coated for a longer service life. The border spreading plate is also new and is now called GSE-X. With this, in bed cultivation you can also prevent fertiliser from ending up in the wheel track.The optional Axmat system with radar sensors for monitoring the spreading pattern and the GSE border spreading plate have also been renewed and are now called Axmat-X and GSE-X respectively. With the latter, in bed cultivation you can also prevent fertiliser from ending up in the wheel track.The Axis 55 has a maximum payload of 5,500 kilograms and the manufacturer stresses that you can carry up to 6,500 litres of fertiliser with a relatively low bulk density when choosing the largest hopper volume. The familiar EMC system automatically monitors the flow and therefore the application rate. For insight into the current hopper contents, Rauch supplies a weighing frame as before.A limited pre-series will be available for spring 2027. Series production and pricing will follow later that year.Join 17,000+ subscribersSubscribe to our newsletter to stay updated about all the need-to-know content in the agricultural sector, two times a week. translationZh:
DLG田间日上并没有太多机器首发，但撒肥机制造商Rauch确实利用该活动展示了一款新机器。

而Axis 55，正是该制造商去年推出新款Axis 25之后的顶级机型。Axis 55接替现有的Axis 50.2系列，因此也将提供机械PTO驱动版本和液压驱动版本。与其“小兄弟”Axis 25的相似之处在于最大流量提升至675公斤/分钟，比之前增加了30%。Rauch进一步开发了撒肥盘和叶片，以覆盖更宽的工作宽度范围。其目标是使用3套撒肥盘即可实现12至56米的撒播宽度，不过对于轻质肥料在大工作宽度下的撒播，不排除需要第4套撒肥盘的可能性。

**高达900公斤/公顷**

这款新的Rauch顶级机型顺应了提高作业能力的发展趋势，料斗容量尤其是流量增加，以便在相对较高的前进速度下进行撒播。得益于增加的流量，理论上可以在25公里/小时的速度下，以36米的工作宽度撒施900公斤/公顷的肥料。在另一端，低施用量（例如杀蜗牛剂）无需改装或附件即可施用。

**3套撒肥盘，可达56米**

根据肥料类型，撒肥机的最小撒播宽度为12米，最大宽度为56米。为此“仅”需3套不同的撒肥盘。此前，覆盖这些工作宽度需要6套撒肥盘。撒肥盘和叶片的形状经过进一步开发，以适配更多工作宽度（此前为18-50米），并且叶片仍采用涂层处理以延长使用寿命。边界撒肥板也是新的，现在称为GSE-X。使用它，在畦作中还可以防止肥料落入轮辙。

用于监测撒播图案的可选Axmat系统（带雷达传感器）和GSE边界撒肥板也已更新，现在分别称为Axmat-X和GSE-X。使用后者，在畦作中还可以防止肥料落入轮辙。

Axis 55的最大有效载荷为5500公斤，制造商强调，选择最大料斗容量时，可装载多达6500升容重较低的肥料。熟悉的EMC系统可自动监测流量，从而控制施用量。为了解当前料斗内容物，Rauch一如既往地提供称重框架。
author: René Koerhuis
contentHtml: The DLG Feldtage did not feature many machine premieres, but fertiliser spreader manufacturer Rauch did use the event to show a new machine.
